_draft_note: INERT STAGING. Not loaded by dialogue_runner.gd (lives under data/_drafts/). State ids prefixed postcard_swine_b14_ to avoid namespace collision with canonical postcard_swine_ch1.json. Scope: postcard body delivery only (stage direction + Pig reads aloud). Asia address-label line lives in asia.json; Pig/Whimsy reaction states live in pig.json/whimsy.json. Promote by merging states into postcard_swine_ch1.json after editorial pass and id-uniqueness check. Author: Claude agent, 2026-05-17.
_chapter_ref: Chapter 1, Beat 14 — Swine postcard stinger. beat_sheet: narrative_revision/beats/chapter_1.md L336-342. Fires after Beat 13 celebration. Canonical postcard origin: Sapporo (phase-4 decision). Sets up Ch4 ski-resort joke and Ch5 Hokkaido arbitration.

states._comment: Stage direction: Pig takes the postcard from the desk and turns it over. He reads sincerely, without editorial pause. The front shows a snow-covered building; the sign is too small to read from this distance. The image is Hokkaido-winter without announcing itself as such.
states.speaker: stage_direction
lines: Pig turns the postcard over. The front shows a snowy building and a sign too small to read at this distance. Pig reads the body aloud.

states._comment: Mr. Pig reads Swine's postcard body aloud verbatim. Three sentences per the canonical postcard register (mr_swine.md section: postcard register and calibration anchors): greeting from Sapporo (canonical phase-4 origin, load-bearing), single business-opportunity sentence, single solvency request. Signoff: dash-S per the Bratislava canonical anchor. Voice discipline applied: 'informally' deployed once in sentence-2 per the Bratislava anchor structure; opportunity sentence uses conditional-adjacent construction ('would benefit from' rather than 'will') and does not explain the deal; the specific detail is 'conference registration' plus 'a man who seemed interested in the concept of Warsaw' — cryptic, Sapporo-specific, not resort-named, plants the Ch4 hook without legibility; solvency ask is direct, no maritime bleed (maritime belongs to Pig's register). No em-dashes in player-facing lines. No contrastive antithesis. The speaker is pig because Pig reads the card aloud; Swine is the absent author.

_postcard_metadata.address_line: To Mr. Pig, Pig & Swine, Warsaw
chapter_hooks: Ch4 ski-resort joke: Sapporo is in Hokkaido; conference infrastructure sits near ski infrastructure
Ch5 Hokkaido arbitration: the registration contact becomes a counterparty

states.speaker: pig
lines: Greetings from Sapporo. There is, informally, a very specific opportunity in conference registration here that would benefit from a Warsaw address, and I have mentioned the firm to a man who seemed interested in the concept of Warsaw. Keep Pig & Swine solvent until I return. Yours, Swine.
